# Nimiq Simple Faucet

A self-hosted Nimiq faucet / payout service. Single Docker image. SDKs for TS, React, Vue, Go, Capacitor, React Native, Flutter. Pluggable abuse pipeline. MCP server for AI agents.

## Install (Docker, SQLite)

```
docker run -d -p 8080:8080 -v faucet-data:/data \
  -e FAUCET_NETWORK=test \
  -e FAUCET_SIGNER_DRIVER=rpc \
  -e FAUCET_RPC_URL=https://... \
  -e FAUCET_WALLET_ADDRESS="NQ12 ..." \
  -e FAUCET_ADMIN_PASSWORD=change-me \
  ghcr.io/nimiq/simple-faucet:latest
```

## Integrate (any framework)

```
POST /v1/claim
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "address": "NQ12 ...",
  "captchaToken": "<turnstile or hcaptcha response>",
  "hostContext": { "uid": "<hashed>", "kycLevel": "email" }
}
```

Response: `{ id, status, txId?, decision?, reason? }`. Poll `GET /v1/claim/:id` or subscribe to `WS /v1/stream` for confirmation.

## Integration recipes

- TS / Node / browser: [/snippets/typescript](./snippets/typescript)
- React: [/snippets/react](./snippets/react)
- Vue 3: [/snippets/vue](./snippets/vue)
- Capacitor: [/snippets/capacitor](./snippets/capacitor)
- React Native: [/snippets/react-native](./snippets/react-native)
- Flutter: [/snippets/flutter](./snippets/flutter)
- Go backend: [/snippets/go](./snippets/go)

## Full reference

Fetch `/openapi.json` for the authoritative schema or `/llms-full.txt` for an LLM-ready flat dump of docs, snippets and decisions.
